title: Add Open VSX publishing workflow scaffold

source.subject: Add Open VSX publishing workflow; reorganize AOT refactor documentation; add obj/ to gitignore

body:
Adds initial **Open VSX publishing workflow** on the superrepo and reorganizes AOT refactor documentation.

## Provenance

- **Subject:** Add Open VSX publishing workflow; reorganize AOT refactor documentation; add obj/ to gitignore
- **Completed:** 2026-03-17

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `editor-extension`
- **Deliverable:** `v01-open-vsx`

## Relation
Opens deliverable **v01-open-vsx**.
